algorithm-merge-sort/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure the project compiles against the new JDK version.
algorithm-merge-sort/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this property, the project may compile against the default JDK version of the build environment, potentially failing to utilize Java 21 features or causing incompatibility if the default is lower than 21.
